title: BEM-870 execute 869
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols','governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:06 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
prev=load('governance/state/bem869_route_after_bem868.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
resp=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md')
txt=read(resp)
created_files=[]
if ps=='response_present_process_protocol' and resp.exists():
    decision='UNKNOWN'
    up=txt.upper()
    if 'DECISION: APPROVED' in up: decision='APPROVED'
    elif 'DECISION: CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
    elif 'DECISION: BLOCKED' in up: decision='BLOCKED'
    protocol=Path('governance/protocols/BEM870_PROTOCOL_RESULT_FROM_BEM844.md')
    protocol.write_text('# BEM-870 | Protocol Result From BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+sep+'Source: `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md`'+sep+sep+'## Response'+sep+sep+txt[:8000]+sep)
    created_files.append(str(protocol))
    status='protocol_result_created_from_response'
    next_action='continue: if BLOCKED repair blocker; if APPROVED finalize protocol'
elif ps=='runtime_seen_response_missing':
    # Runtime exists but no valid response; create explicit fail-closed response if missing.
    if not resp.exists():
        resp.write_text('# CLAUDE RESPONSE | BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Date: '+created+sep+'Decision: BLOCKED'+sep+'Reason: Runtime exists but no valid Claude response file was committed. Fail-closed result; not approval.'+sep)
        created_files.append(str(resp))
    status='fail_closed_response_materialized_for_runtime_missing_response'
    next_action='process fail-closed BLOCKED response and continue runtime/action repair'
elif ps=='dispatch_attempted_but_runtime_missing':
    status='runtime_missing_blocker_recorded'
    next_action='repair Claude dispatcher runtime state writer / workflow target'
else:
    status='current_proofs_need_diagnosis'
    next_action='diagnose current response/runtime/dispatch proofs'
state={'bem':'BEM-870','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'created_files':created_files,'response_exists':resp.exists(),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem870_execute_after_bem869.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem870_execute_after_bem869.md').write_text('# BEM-870 | Execute After BEM-869 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem870_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-870'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem870_execute_after_bem869.json','governance/reports/bem870_execute_after_bem869.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem870_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-869 route by creating protocol result from response, materializing fail-closed response, or recording runtime blocker')
"""
No issue comments.
